name: Tomato Sauce with Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Green beans, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil gently in a large pot.
2. Add garlic and sauté for 30 seconds.
3. Add green bell pepper and continue to sauté gently for about 1 minute.
4. Add green beans and stir well.
5. Add tomatoes, parsley, salt, and pepper.
6. Simmer the mixture for 10 minutes.
7. Continue cooking until the tomatoes have reduced into a sauce. You may add some stock if needed, but avoid adding too much to prevent the sauce from becoming watery.
8. Taste and adjust seasonings as necessary.
9. Serve hot sauce tossed over cooked spaghetti with homemade garlic bread on the side.
